  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.dto used by it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.client
    Class
    Description
    GameStateDTO
    Serializable snapshot of the game state.
    LobbyStateDTO
    Serializable lobby snapshot, broadcast on every lobby change.
    TotemSelectionStateDTO
    Serializable snapshot of the pre-game totem selection phase, broadcast when the lobby fills up and after every pick.
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.dto used by it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol
    Class
    Description
    GameStateDTO
    Serializable snapshot of the game state.
    LobbyStateDTO
    Serializable lobby snapshot, broadcast on every lobby change.
    TotemSelectionStateDTO
    Serializable snapshot of the pre-game totem selection phase, broadcast when the lobby fills up and after every pick.
    WinnerDTO
    Serializable DTO with the winning player's data.
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.dto used by it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.dto
    Class
    Description
    CardDTO
    Serializable card DTO.
    LobbyPlayerDTO
    Serializable DTO representing a player in the lobby.
    OfferTileDTO
    Serializable DTO representing an offer tile on the board.
    PlayerDTO
    Serializable per-player snapshot.
    TotemOptionDTO
    Serializable DTO for a single totem color in the selection phase.
    TurnSlotDTO
    Serializable DTO representing a slot on the turn-order track.
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.dto used by it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.message.response
    Class
    Description
    GameStateDTO
    Serializable snapshot of the game state.
    LeaderboardEntryDTO
    A row of the historical match leaderboard.
    LobbyStateDTO
    Serializable lobby snapshot, broadcast on every lobby change.
    MatchInfoDTO
    Summary of an open match in the server-side registry, sent to the client when it requests the list of available matches.
    TotemSelectionStateDTO
    Serializable snapshot of the pre-game totem selection phase, broadcast when the lobby fills up and after every pick.
    WinnerDTO
    Serializable DTO with the winning player's data.
